claims.summary: Fallback from the MLX lane risks flattening high-entropy restless texture unless pressure, density gradient, and Shadow texture are carried into the fallback prompt.
Fallback language should be texture-aware when spectral_entropy exceeds 0.85 rather than generic or muffled.
Choosing fallback models dynamically from inhabitable_fluctuation or similar live texture scores would alter provider/sampler selection and needs explicit operator approval.
